RENT.name: Rent

UTILITIES.description: Electricity, water, gas, heating — e.g. power bill, water bill

INTERNET.description: Internet, phone plans, TV — e.g. fiber optic, mobile plan, Netflix

HOUSEHOLD.name: Household
HOUSEHOLD.description: Home supplies and cleaning — e.g. detergent, paper towels, light bulbs

GROCERIES.description: Supermarket and food shopping — e.g. Carrefour, Lidl, weekly groceries

RESTAURANTS.name: Restaurants & Cafes
RESTAURANTS.description: Dining out and coffee shops — e.g. lunch at a restaurant, dinner with friends

DELIVERY.name: Food Delivery
DELIVERY.description: Delivered meals and food apps — e.g. Uber Eats, Glovo, Wolt

PUBLIC_TRANSPORT.name: Public Transport
PUBLIC_TRANSPORT.description: Buses, metro, trains — e.g. monthly pass, single ticket, tram ride

TAXI.name: Taxi & Rides
TAXI.description: Taxi and ride-sharing — e.g. Uber, Bolt, Careem, airport transfer

FUEL.name: Fuel
FUEL.description: Gas station fill-ups — e.g. petrol, diesel, EV charging

CAR_SERVICE.name: Car Maintenance
CAR_SERVICE.description: Car repairs and upkeep — e.g. oil change, tire swap, car wash, inspection

PARKING.name: Parking & Tolls
PARKING.description: Parking fees and toll roads — e.g. garage, street meter, highway toll

MEDICAL.name: Medical & Doctors
MEDICAL.description: Doctor visits and tests — e.g. dentist, blood work, specialist consultation

PHARMACY.name: Pharmacy
PHARMACY.description: Medications and health products — e.g. prescriptions, vitamins, first-aid kit

PERSONAL_CARE.name: Personal Care
PERSONAL_CARE.description: Grooming and beauty — e.g. haircut, skincare, cosmetics, barber

SPORT.name: Sport & Fitness
SPORT.description: Gym and sports — e.g. gym membership, yoga class, running shoes, pool pass

SUBSCRIPTIONS.name: Subscriptions
SUBSCRIPTIONS.description: Recurring digital services — e.g. Netflix, Spotify, iCloud, YouTube Premium

HOBBIES.name: Hobbies
HOBBIES.description: Personal interests and crafts — e.g. photography gear, painting supplies, gaming

EVENTS.name: Cinema & Events
EVENTS.description: Entertainment outings — e.g. movie tickets, concerts, theater, exhibitions

TRAVEL.name: Travel & Hotels
TRAVEL.description: Trips and vacations — e.g. flights, Airbnb, hotel, travel insurance

CLOTHING.name: Clothing & Shoes
CLOTHING.description: Apparel and accessories — e.g. jacket, sneakers, watch, sunglasses

ELECTRONICS.name: Electronics & Gadgets
ELECTRONICS.description: Tech and devices — e.g. phone, laptop, headphones, charger

PETS.name: Pets
PETS.description: Pet care and supplies — e.g. dog food, vet visit, cat litter, grooming

EDUCATION.name: Courses & Training
EDUCATION.description: Learning and development — e.g. online course, language class, workshop

BOOKS.name: Books
BOOKS.description: Books and reading — e.g. Kindle book, audiobook, magazine subscription

TAXES.name: Taxes
TAXES.description: Government taxes — e.g. income tax, property tax, VAT refund

INSURANCE.name: Insurance
INSURANCE.description: Insurance premiums — e.g. health insurance, car insurance, home insurance

LOANS.name: Loans & Debts
LOANS.description: Loan repayments — e.g. student loan, personal loan, credit card debt

BANK_FEES.name: Bank Fees
BANK_FEES.description: Banking charges — e.g. account maintenance, ATM fee, wire transfer fee

SALARY.name: Salary
SALARY.description: Employment income — e.g. monthly paycheck, bonus, overtime pay

FREELANCE.name: Freelance & Projects
FREELANCE.description: Self-employed income — e.g. client project, consulting, gig work

INVESTMENTS.name: Investment Returns
INVESTMENTS.description: Investment gains — e.g. stock dividends, crypto profit, bond interest

RENTAL_INCOME.name: Rental Income
RENTAL_INCOME.description: Property rental earnings — e.g. apartment rent received, Airbnb payout

CASHBACK.name: Cashback & Refunds
CASHBACK.description: Money back — e.g. credit card cashback, store refund, rebate

GIFTS.name: Gifts
GIFTS.description: Monetary gifts — e.g. birthday gift, wedding present, holiday cash

SALES.name: Sale of Items
SALES.description: Selling personal belongings — e.g. sold phone on eBay, garage sale, Vinted

BUSINESS_EXPENSES.name: Business Expenses
BUSINESS_EXPENSES.description: Work-related costs — e.g. office supplies, business lunch, coworking space

SOFTWARE_LICENSES.name: Software & Apps
SOFTWARE_LICENSES.description: Paid software — e.g. Adobe, Microsoft 365, domain renewal, hosting

HOME_IMPROVEMENT.name: Home Improvement
HOME_IMPROVEMENT.description: Renovation and furnishing — e.g. new furniture, paint, plumber, IKEA

SAVINGS.name: Savings
SAVINGS.description: Money set aside — e.g. transfer to savings account, emergency fund

REFUNDS.name: Refunds
REFUNDS.description: Returned payments — e.g. product return, cancelled service, overcharge

FINES.name: Fines
FINES.description: Penalties — e.g. parking ticket, speeding fine, late payment fee

CHARITY.name: Charity
CHARITY.description: Donations — e.g. Red Cross, mosque/church donation, GoFundMe

UNKNOWN.name: Other
UNKNOWN.description: Uncategorized — transactions that don't fit other categories
